mapper.select:
SELECT agent.id AS agentId, agent.agent_key AS agentKey, agent.agent_name AS agentName, agent.description AS agentDescription, agent.avatar_url AS agentAvatarUrl, agent.agent_type AS agentType, agent.STATUS AS agentStatus,
tenant.id AS tenantId, tenant.tenant_name AS tenantName, tenant.STATUS AS tenantStatus, tenant.nacos_namespace_id AS tenantNacosNamespaceId, tenant.remark AS tenantRemark,
ac.id AS agentConfigId, ac.sys_prompt AS sysPrompt, ac.model_id AS modelId, ac.max_iters AS maxIters, ac.workspace_path AS workspacePath, ac.permission_mode AS permissionMode, ac.visual_schema_json AS visualSchemaJson, ac.publish_status AS publishStatus, ac.published_at AS publishedAt, ac.tool_result_eviction_enabled AS toolResultEvictionEnabled, ac.context_enabled AS contextEnabled, ac.trigger_messages AS triggerMessages, ac.keep_messages AS keepMessages, ac.trigger_tokens AS triggerTokens, ac.keep_tokens AS keepTokens, ac.truncate_args_enabled AS truncateArgsEnabled, ac.tool_result_eviction_enabled AS toolResultEvictionEnabled, ac.memory_enable AS memoryEnable, ac.plan_mode_enabled AS planModeEnabled, ac.plan_file_directory AS planFileDirectory, ac.task_list_enabled AS taskListEnabled, ac.allow_shell_in_plan_mode AS allowShellInPlanMode, ac.plan_exit_approval_required AS planExitApprovalRequired, ac.plan_max_steps AS planMaxSteps, ac.plan_auto_enter_enabled AS planAutoEnterEnabled, ac.plan_prompt AS planPrompt,
model.id AS modelId, model.provider AS provider, model.base_URL AS baseUrl, model.api_key AS apiKey, model.model_name AS modelName, model.is_stream AS isStream, model.temperature AS temperature, model.top_p AS topP, model.max_tokens AS maxTokens, model.timeout_ms AS timeoutMs, model.max_attempts AS maxAttempts, model.fallback_model_config_id AS fallbackModelConfigId, model.STATUS AS modelStatus FROM ai_agent agent LEFT JOIN sys_tenant tenant ON agent.tenant_id = tenant.id LEFT JOIN ai_agent_config ac ON ac.agent_id = agent.id AND ac.deleted = 0 AND ac.publish_status = 1 LEFT JOIN ai_agent_model model ON model.id = ac.model_id AND model.deleted = 0 WHERE agent.id = #{agentId} AND agent.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND agent.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ac.published_at DESC, ac.id DESC LIMIT 1
